projects.name: NousResearch/hermes-agent
projects.description: The agent that grows with you
projects.highlights: 自适应成长型 AI Agent 框架，今日新增 7454 stars，是当日全站最热门项目。支持持续学习和能力扩展。

projects.name: shiyu-coder/Kronos
projects.description: Kronos: A Foundation Model for the Language of Financial Markets
projects.highlights: 金融市场语言基础模型，专为金融时序数据设计的 Foundation Model，覆盖 A/H/美股等多市场。

projects.name: multica-ai/multica
projects.description: The open-source managed agents platform. Turn coding agents into real teammates — assign tasks, track progress, compound skills.
projects.highlights: 开源托管 Agent 平台，将编码 Agent 转化为真实队友，支持任务分配、进度追踪和技能复合。

projects.name: OpenBMB/VoxCPM
projects.description: VoxCPM2: Tokenizer-Free TTS for Multilingual Speech Generation, Creative Voice Design, and True-to-Life Cloning
projects.highlights: 无 Tokenizer 的多语言 TTS 系统，支持创意声音设计和高仿真语音克隆，清华 OpenBMB 团队出品。

projects.name: thedotmack/claude-mem
projects.description: A Claude Code plugin that automatically captures everything Claude does during your coding sessions, compresses it with AI and injects relevant context back into future sessions.
projects.highlights: Claude Code 记忆增强插件，自动捕获编码会话内容，AI 压缩后注入未来会话上下文，解决大模型上下文遗忘问题。

projects.name: coleam00/Archon
projects.description: The first open-source harness builder for AI coding. Make AI coding deterministic and repeatable.
projects.highlights: 首个开源 AI 编码测试框架，让 AI 编码结果可确定、可复现，解决 AI 生成代码质量不稳定问题。

projects.name: snarktank/ralph
projects.description: Ralph is an autonomous AI agent loop that runs repeatedly until all PRD items are complete.
projects.highlights: 自主 AI Agent 循环执行框架，持续运行直至 PRD 中所有条目完成，实现真正的自主开发。

projects.name: rustfs/rustfs
projects.description: 🚀 2.3x faster than MinIO for 4KB object payloads. RustFS is an open-source, S3-compatible high-performance object storage system supporting migration and coexistence with other S3-compatible platforms.
projects.highlights: 4KB 对象负载下比 MinIO 快 2.3 倍的 S3 兼容高性能对象存储系统，支持与 MinIO/Ceph 迁移共存。

projects.name: microsoft/markitdown
projects.description: Python tool for converting files and office documents to Markdown.
projects.highlights: 微软出品，将 Office 文档、PDF 等各类文件转换为 Markdown 格式，AI 文档处理利器。

projects.name: virattt/ai-hedge-fund
projects.description: An AI Hedge Fund Team
projects.highlights: AI 驱动的对冲基金团队模拟系统，多个 AI Agent 协作执行量化投资策略。

projects.name: TapXWorld/ChinaTextbook
projects.description: 所有小初高、大学PDF教材。
projects.highlights: 收录中国中小学及大学全套 PDF 教材，开源教育资源库。

projects.name: forrestchang/andrej-karpathy-skills
projects.description: A single CLAUDE.md file to improve Claude Code behavior, derived from Andrej Karpathy's observations on LLM coding pitfalls.
projects.highlights: 基于 Andrej Karpathy 对 LLM 编码缺陷观察提炼的 CLAUDE.md 配置文件，改善 Claude Code 行为。

projects.name: hugohe3/ppt-master
projects.description: AI generates natively editable PPTX from any document — real PowerPoint shapes, not images — no design skills needed
projects.highlights: AI 从任意文档生成原生可编辑 PPTX，生成真实 PowerPoint 图形而非图片，无需设计技能。

projects.name: ZhuLinsen/daily_stock_analysis
projects.description: LLM驱动的 A/H/美股智能分析器：多数据源行情 + 实时新闻 + LLM决策仪表盘 + 多渠道推送，零成本定时运行，纯白嫖
projects.highlights: LLM 驱动股票分析系统，覆盖 A/H/美股，整合多数据源行情+实时新闻+LLM决策，支持多渠道推送，零成本运行。

projects.name: aloshdenny/reverse-SynthID
projects.description: reverse engineering Gemini's SynthID detection
projects.highlights: 逆向工程 Google Gemini SynthID AI 内容水印检测机制，揭示 AI 生成内容检测漏洞。

projects.name: HKUDS/DeepTutor
projects.description: Agent-Native Personalized Learning Assistant
projects.highlights: Agent 原生个性化学习助手，香港大学出品，自适应教学系统。

projects.name: pydantic/monty
projects.description: A minimal, secure Python interpreter written in Rust for use by AI
projects.highlights: Rust 编写的极简安全 Python 解释器，专为 AI 使用设计，pydantic 出品，解决 AI 代码执行安全问题。

projects.name: openai/codex
projects.description: Lightweight coding agent that runs in your terminal
projects.highlights: OpenAI 出品的轻量级终端编码 Agent，直接在命令行中运行 AI 编程助手。

projects.name: nearai/ironclaw
projects.description: IronClaw is OpenClaw inspired implementation in Rust focused on privacy and security
projects.highlights: 受 OpenClaw 启发用 Rust 实现的隐私安全优先的 AI Agent 框架。

projects.name: mikeyobrien/ralph-orchestrator
projects.description: An improved implementation of the Ralph Wiggum technique for autonomous AI agent orchestration
projects.highlights: Ralph Wiggum 技术改进版，自主 AI Agent 编排系统，Rust 编写，高性能 Agent 协作调度。

projects.name: dora-rs/dora
projects.description: DORA (Dataflow-Oriented Robotic Architecture) is middleware designed to streamline and simplify the creation of AI-based robotic applications.
projects.highlights: 数据流导向机器人架构中间件，低延迟可组合分布式数据流，应用建模为有向图，简化 AI 机器人开发。

projects.name: rolldown/rolldown
projects.description: Fast Rust bundler for JavaScript/TypeScript with Rollup-compatible API.
projects.highlights: Rust 编写的 JS/TS 高速打包工具，兼容 Rollup API，Vite 下一代打包引擎核心。

projects.name: gitbutlerapp/gitbutler
projects.description: The GitButler version control client, backed by Git, powered by Tauri/Rust/Svelte
projects.highlights: Git 版本控制客户端，Tauri/Rust/Svelte 驱动，创新性多分支并行开发工作流。

projects.name: launchbadge/sqlx
projects.description: 🧰 The Rust SQL Toolkit. An async, pure Rust SQL crate featuring compile-time checked queries without a DSL. Supports PostgreSQL, MySQL, and SQLite.
projects.highlights: Rust 异步 SQL 工具包，编译期查询检查，无 DSL 设计，支持 PostgreSQL/MySQL/SQLite。

projects.name: pola-rs/polars
projects.description: Extremely fast Query Engine for DataFrames, written in Rust
projects.highlights: Rust 编写的极速 DataFrame 查询引擎，比 pandas 快数十倍，AI/数据科学领域高频工具。

projects.name: googleapis/mcp-toolbox
projects.description: MCP Toolbox for Databases is an open source MCP server for databases.
projects.highlights: Google 出品的数据库 MCP Server 开源工具箱，让 AI 直连数据库执行操作。

projects.name: mostlygeek/llama-swap
projects.description: Reliable model swapping for any local OpenAI/Anthropic compatible server - llama.cpp, vllm, etc
projects.highlights: 本地 AI 服务器可靠模型热交换工具，兼容 llama.cpp/vllm 等，支持 OpenAI/Anthropic API 格式。

projects.name: netbirdio/netbird
projects.description: Connect your devices into a secure WireGuard®-based overlay network with SSO, MFA and granular access controls.
projects.highlights: 基于 WireGuard 的安全覆盖网络，支持 SSO/MFA 和细粒度访问控制，零信任网络架构。

projects.name: mudler/LocalAI
projects.description: LocalAI is the open-source AI engine. Run any model - LLMs, vision, voice, image, video - on any hardware. No GPU required.
projects.highlights: 开源本地 AI 引擎，无 GPU 要求运行 LLM/视觉/语音/图像/视频模型，替代 OpenAI API 的本地方案。

projects.name: fluxcd/flux2
projects.description: Open and extensible continuous delivery solution for Kubernetes. Powered by GitOps Toolkit.
projects.highlights: Kubernetes GitOps 持续交付解决方案，开放可扩展架构，GitOps Toolkit 驱动。

projects.name: NationalSecurityAgency/ghidra
projects.description: Ghidra is a software reverse engineering (SRE) framework
projects.highlights: NSA 开源的软件逆向工程框架，是安全研究人员的核心工具。

projects.name: zinja-coder/jadx-ai-mcp
projects.description: Plugin for JADX to integrate MCP server
projects.highlights: JADX 反编译工具集成 MCP Server 插件，AI 辅助 Android APK 逆向分析。

projects.name: spring-projects/spring-security
projects.description: Spring Security
projects.highlights: Spring 生态核心安全框架，Java 后端认证授权标准实现。

projects.name: JingMatrix/Vector
projects.description: Modern Xposed Framework
projects.highlights: 现代化 Xposed 框架实现，Android 系统级 hook 和模块化框架。

projects.name: woheller69/FreeDroidWarn
projects.description: Android privacy and security warning app
projects.highlights: Android 隐私安全警告应用，检测设备安全风险并发出预警。

projects.name: nvidia-isaac/cuVSLAM
projects.description: cuVSLAM: CUDA-Accelerated Visual Odometry and Mapping
projects.highlights: NVIDIA CUDA 加速视觉里程计与地图构建，机器人/自动驾驶核心感知算法 GPU 加速实现。

projects.name: ikawrakow/ik_llama.cpp
projects.description: llama.cpp fork with additional SOTA quants and improved performance
projects.highlights: llama.cpp 增强分支，加入更多 SOTA 量化方案和性能优化，本地大模型推理性能提升。

projects.name: daijro/camoufox
projects.description: 🦊 Anti-detect browser
projects.highlights: 反指纹检测浏览器，绕过 bot 检测机制，爬虫/隐私保护场景核心工具。

projects.name: longbridge/gpui-component
projects.description: Rust GUI components for building fantastic cross-platform desktop application by using GPUI.
projects.highlights: 基于 GPUI 的 Rust 跨平台桌面 UI 组件库，富途证券出品，高性能桌面应用开发。

projects.name: farion1231/cc-switch
projects.description: A cross-platform desktop All-in-One assistant tool for Claude Code, Codex, OpenCode, openclaw & Gemini CLI.
projects.highlights: 跨平台桌面全能助手工具，统一管理 Claude Code/Codex/OpenCode/OpenClaw/Gemini CLI。

projects.name: arendst/Tasmota
projects.description: Alternative firmware for ESP8266 and ESP32 based devices with easy configuration using webUI, OTA updates, automation using timers or rules.
projects.highlights: ESP8266/ESP32 替代固件，支持 WebUI 配置、OTA 更新、MQTT/HTTP/KNX 协议，智能家居利器。

projects.name: espressif/esp-idf
projects.description: Espressif IoT Development Framework. Official development framework for Espressif SoCs.
projects.highlights: 乐鑫官方 IoT 开发框架，ESP32 系列 SoC 标准开发环境，物联网和嵌入式开发核心。

projects.name: betaflight/betaflight
projects.description: Open Source Flight Controller Firmware
projects.highlights: 开源飞控固件，无人机/FPV 竞速机标准固件，支持多种飞控硬件。

projects.name: Next-Flip/Momentum-Firmware
projects.description: 🐬 Feature-rich, stable and customizable Flipper Firmware
projects.highlights: Flipper Zero 功能丰富稳定的定制固件，安全研究/渗透测试硬件工具增强版。

projects.name: nautechsystems/nautilus_trader

projects.highlights: 生产级 Rust 原生交易引擎，确定性事件驱动架构，量化交易系统高性能实现。

projects.name: PaperMC/Paper
projects.description: The most widely used, high performance Minecraft server
projects.highlights: 最广泛使用的高性能 Minecraft 服务端，修复游戏机制不一致问题，插件开发标准平台。
